creator: robak@freebsd.org
text: Hi, your patch fails to apply as there's no such thing in the port as 'usr/lib/byobu'. It seems like you're trying to patch things that only exist in the OS after the port is being installed, which is incorrect. Please, check the FreeBSD Porters Handbook on how to prepare a proper patch and reopen the PR once you have it working properly and tested. Thanks!
